manifest.description: A complete engineering workflow for AI-assisted MVPs in Codex.
manifest.longDescription: Plan, build, verify, review, and release AI-assisted products with persistent project context and practical engineering guardrails.
defaultPrompt: Use $omc-orchestrator to turn my app idea into a buildable MVP.
Use $omc-review to audit this AI-generated codebase.
Use $omc-release to prepare this project for a safe release.

omc-architecture.short_description: Plan modules, contracts, and safe changes
omc-architecture.default_prompt: Use $omc-architecture to design this approved MVP.

omc-cn.short_description: Switch OhMyCodex metadata to Simplified Chinese
omc-cn.default_prompt: Use $omc-cn to switch OhMyCodex to Simplified Chinese.

omc-debt.default_prompt: Use $omc-debt to record this technical debt.

omc-debug.short_description: Find root cause before changing code
omc-debug.default_prompt: Use $omc-debug to diagnose this failing behavior.

omc-discover.short_description: Clarify users, outcomes, and MVP scope
omc-discover.default_prompt: Use $omc-discover to clarify this product idea.

omc-doctor.short_description: Inspect capabilities and safe degradation routes
omc-doctor.default_prompt: Use $omc-doctor to inspect this Codex environment safely.

omc-en.default_prompt: Use $omc-en to restore OhMyCodex English metadata.

omc-implement.short_description: Build approved work in verified milestones
omc-implement.default_prompt: Use $omc-implement to execute the approved plan.

omc-init.default_prompt: Use $omc-init to initialize this project workspace.

omc-intentgate.short_description: Route intent through capabilities and safe continuation
omc-intentgate.default_prompt: Use $omc-intentgate to route this request and start safe continuation when needed.

omc-letgo.short_description: Let Codex choose the safest useful workflow
omc-letgo.default_prompt: Use $omc-letgo to choose and execute the safest useful workflow autonomously.

omc-loop.short_description: Continue validated work with native Codex Goals
omc-loop.default_prompt: Use $omc-loop to continue this validated objective with native Codex Goals.

omc-orchestrator.default_prompt: Use $omc-orchestrator to choose the right engineering workflow.

omc-refactor.default_prompt: Use $omc-refactor to simplify this code safely.

omc-release.short_description: Decide go or no-go with evidence

omc-review.short_description: Audit code against the active specification

omc-spec.default_prompt: Use $omc-spec to write a scoped MVP specification.

omc-team.short_description: Configure and run native subagent teams
omc-team.default_prompt: Use $omc-team to delegate this complex task safely.
